name: RAP PAC rapalog pharmacology registry
summary: Recruiting phase 1 non-randomized study assigning adults aged 55 to 89 to weekly sirolimus or everolimus dose cohorts to identify safe and effective rapalog dosing for human geroprotection.
population: Adults aged 55 to 89 years free of overt chronic disease

trial_details.expected_results_window: The registry listed estimated primary completion in March 2027 and estimated study completion in December 2028, with no posted results in the June 11, 2026 API view.
trial_details.horizon_note: Recruiting no-results dose, safety, and target-engagement context.
trial_details.why_it_matters: RAP PAC directly addresses dosing, toxicities, pharmacokinetics, tissue target engagement, and metabolic effects for sirolimus and everolimus, making it central safety and mechanism watch context for Rapalogs.
